code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut token_index = 0
mut first = true
mut output = ""
mut in_token = false
mut token_start = 0

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  match b_opt
  when Some(b)
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_ws
      if in_token
        let tok = string.substring(input, token_start, i)
        if token_index % 2 == 0
          if first
            output = tok
            first = false
          else
            output = "#{output} #{tok}"
          end
        end
        token_index = token_index + 1
        in_token = false
      end
    else
      if not in_token
        token_start = i
        in_token = true
      end
    end
  when None
    i = n
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_token
  let tok = string.substring(input, token_start, n)
  if token_index % 2 == 0
    if first
      output = tok
      first = false
    else
      output = "#{output} #{tok}"
    end
  end
end

println(output)
